component.name: B.I.O.R. Cam
component.summary: Control panel and recorder for USB webcams on Orange Pi 5 Max

description.p: B.I.O.R. Cam is a lightweight control panel and video recorder designed for USB webcams (optimized for EMEET SmartCam S600) on Single Board Computers like the Orange Pi 5 Max (RK3588).

Standard Linux camera apps (like Cheese or GNOME Snapshot) often fail to capture high-resolution streams from webcams because they attempt to request uncompressed YUV raw streams, which saturate the USB bandwidth, or because their hardware-accelerated GStreamer pipelines trigger the Rockchip RK3588 RGA MMU bug on systems with more than 4GB of RAM, crashing the kernel.

This application solves these issues by forcing a clean software-decoded MJPEG preview stream through mpv (safely avoiding the RGA kernel bug), while enabling high-performance hardware-accelerated video recording (H.264/H.265 RKMPP) and multi-channel audio mixing in the background.
